zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Badlesmere於1265年出生時，她的父親Sir Guncelin Badlesmere11262歲，母親Joan FitzBernard32歲。她和Sir John Northwood I至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1319年6月2日在英國肯特享年54歲，埋葬在英國肯特明斯特 在 謝坡。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Badlesmere was born in 1265, her father, Sir Guncelin Badlesmere, was 11262 and her mother, Joan FitzBernard, was 32. She had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Sir John Northwood I. She died on 2 June 1319, in Kent, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Badlesmere est née en 1265, son père, Sir Guncelin Badlesmere, avait 11262 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzBernard, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Sir John Northwood I. Elle est décédée le 2 juin 1319, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Northwoode Chastiners,Isle Of Sheppey,Ke: Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Badlesmere 1265 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Guncelin Badlesmere 11262 und ihre Mutter Joan FitzBernard 32. Sie hatte mit Sir John Northwood I mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Juni 1319 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Sir John Northwood I. Morì il 2 giugno 1319, nel Kent, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Minster in Sheppey, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Badlesmereが1265年に生まれた時，父Sir Guncelin Badlesmereは11262歳，母Joan FitzBernardは32歳であった。彼女はSir John Northwood Iとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1319年6月2日にイギリスケントで54歳で死去し，イギリスケントミンスター イン シェッピーにて埋葬された。

ko.Northwoode Chastiners,Isle Of Sheppey,Ke: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이슬일 프 셰피
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Badlesmere(이)가 1265년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Guncelin Badlesmere(은)는 11262세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan FitzBernard(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Northwood I(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1319년 6월 2일 영국 켄트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 민스터 인 셰피에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Badlesmere nasceu em 1265, seu pai, Sir Guncelin Badlesmere, tinha 11262 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzBernard, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Sir John Northwood I. Ela faleceu em 2 de junho de 1319, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Minster in Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.Northwoode Chastiners,Isle Of Sheppey,Ke: исл оф шеппи, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Badlesmere родилась в 1265 г., её отцу по имени Sir Guncelin Badlesmere было 11262 года, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzBernard, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Sir John Northwood I. Она умерла 2 июня 1319 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности минстир ин шеппи, кэнт, Англия.
